name: Golden Glow Pork Chops/cp
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly brown pork chops on both sides in a large skillet or slow-cooking pot with the browning unit.
2. Pour off excess fat.
3. Combine brown sugar, cinnamon, cloves, tomato sauce, 1/4 cup syrup from peaches, and vinegar.
4. Sprinkle chops with salt and pepper.
5. Arrange chops in the slow cooking pot.
6. Place drained peach halves on top.
7. Pour tomato mixture over all.
8. Cover and cook on low for 4 to 6 hours.
9. Makes 5 to 6 servings.
